mapper.select: SELECT wr.id, wr.status, wr.operator_id AS operatorId, ua.display_name AS operatorName, ua.role_code AS operatorRole, wr.record_note AS recordNote, wr.created_at AS recordedAt FROM work_order_records wr LEFT JOIN user_accounts ua ON ua.id = wr.operator_id WHERE wr.work_order_id = #{workOrderId} ORDER BY wr.created_at ASC, wr.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_order_records ( work_order_id, operator_id, status, record_note ) VALUES ( #{workOrderId}, #{operatorId}, #{status}, #{recordNote} )
